title: Instrument de ratification du Royaume-Uni
text_preview: Whereas, for the better treating of and arranging certain matters which are now in discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Governments of certain other Member States of the European Space Research Organisation, of the one part, and the European Space Research Organisation, of the other part, concerning the execution of…

pages.text:
Whereas, for the better treating of and

arranging certain matters which are now in discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of

Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the

Governments of certain other Member States of the

European Space Research Organisation, of the one part, and the European Space Research Organisation, of the other part, concerning the execution of a maritime satellite programme, it is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Power to conduct the said discussion on the part of the

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland: I, Sir Alexander Frederick

Douglas-Home, Knight of the Most Ancient and Most

Noble Order of the Thistle, a Member of Her

Majesty's Most Honourable Privy Council, etc., etc., Her Majesty's Principal Secretary of State for Foreign and Conmonwealth Affairs, do hereby certify that John Roderic Steele, Esquire, an

Under-Secretary in the Department of Trade and

Industry, is by these Presents named, constituted and appointed as

Plenipotentiary

and

Representative having Full Power and Authority to agree and conclude with such Plenipotentiaries and

Representatives as may be vested with similar

Power and Authority on the part of the Governments and the Organisation aforesaid any Treaty,

Convention,

Agreement,

Protocol or other

Instrument that may tend to the attainment of the above-mentioned end,

and to sign for the

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland everything so agreed upon and concluded.

Further, I do hereby certify that whatever things shall be so transacted and concluded by the said Plenipotentiary and

Representative shall, subject if necessary to

Ratification by the Government of the United

Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, be agreed to, acknowledged and accepted by the said

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain

and Northern Ireland in the fullest manner.

In witness whereof I have signed these

Presents and affixed hereto my Seal.

Signed and sealed at the Foreign and

Commonwealth Office, London, the Iwentieth day of

September, One thousand Nine hundred and Seventy- three.
